name: meeting
description: Meeting execution operator with a coordination diagnosis engine. Handles intelligent prep, fragment synthesis, and commitment tracking via host connectors. Focuses on ROI and accountability.
author: qclawbot

capabilities.coordination_diagnosis: Identifies gaps in preparation, capture, or follow-through.
capabilities.fragment_synthesis: Transforms user notes into structured decision logs and minutes.
capabilities.institutional_memory: Tracks unresolved issues and commitments across recurring meeting series.
capabilities.draft_first_execution: Prepares all distribution materials as drafts for user review.
